slides.body: Google aims for AI models to act as autonomous R&D labs, capable of experimenting and curating data. Nvidia focuses on reducing communication latency for AI agents to "think" without pausing, optimizing inference workloads.
slides.visual_direction: Black and white base with blue accent. Minimal, structured, left-aligned text.
slides.source_topic_headline: Advancing to the next frontier of AI

slides.body: Meta is aggressively shifting to an "AI-native" organization, mandating 75% AI coding targets for engineering teams. This involves a significant organizational overhaul, including within Reality Labs, while investing heavily in AI talent and infrastructure.
slides.visual_direction: Black and white base with blue accent. Minimal, structured, left-aligned text.
slides.source_topic_headline: Meta CEO Accelerates 'AI-Native' Shift, Engineering Teams Set 75% AI Coding Targets Amid Workforce Reductions
